# muze

> Free browser-based music studio. Play 15+ real instruments using your keyboard, record clips, layer them on a multitrack timeline, and export your composition — no download, no signup.

## Product
muze is a browser-based music composition studio at muze.ammarimtiaz.com. Users turn their physical keyboard into a musical instrument — the keyboard layout mirrors the instrument (strings, frets, keys, pads). It supports recording, a multitrack timeline composer, and audio export.

## Instruments
Piano, Guitar, Electric Guitar, Bass Guitar, Violin, Ukulele, Drums, Xylophone, Marimba, Flute, Saxophone, Trumpet, Organ, Harmonium, Tabla.

- Learn: https://muze.ammarimtiaz.com/learn

## Key Features
- Play instruments with your physical keyboard — no mouse needed
- Record clips from any instrument using your microphone
- Multitrack timeline composer — layer clips, adjust timing, play all back simultaneously
- Export individual clips as audio files
- Projects system — create multiple named projects with separate clip sets
- Beginner-friendly with always-visible key guides, but unobtrusive for pros
- Supports Indian classical instruments (Harmonium, Tabla) with raga modes and taal patterns
- Completely free, no account required, runs in any modern browser

## Creator
Built by Ammar Imtiaz — https://ammarimtiaz.com
